name: competitive-product-research
tagline: 8-dimension competitive benchmarking with scored HTML reports
description: Structured competitive product research expert. Benchmarks your product against competitors across 8 UX dimensions (info architecture, interaction flow, visual design, copy strategy, growth, edge cases, cross-platform, compliance). Outputs a themed HTML report with S/A/B/C health score, benchmark matrix, key findings, reusable patterns, and P0/P1/P2 recommendations. Zero-barrier start — just describe your goal and name the competitors.
author: Chris1Wang3
